ham.subject: Your AcmeCRM Subscription Renewal - Action Required
ham.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We hope you are enjoying the features of AcmeCRM. This is a reminder that your current subscription is set to expire on 25th April 2026.

To continue uninterrupted service, please renew your subscription at the earliest. If you renew before 20th April 2026, you will receive a 10% discount on the annual plan.

Click the link below to review your plan options and complete the renewal:
<URL>

If you have any questions or need assistance, feel free to reply to this email or contact our support team at support@acmecrm.com.

Thank you for choosing AcmeCRM.

Best regards,
AcmeCRM Billing Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Ticket #IT-2134 – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Hi Rahul,

We have detected a potential security issue with your account. Our system has flagged unusual activity and we need to verify your credentials to keep your account safe.

Please click the link below and confirm your username and password to avoid suspension of your services:
<URL>

If you do not act within 24 hours, your account will be temporarily locked and you will lose access to all internal tools.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Best,
IT Support Team
Acme Corp
